title: EP - Authenticated user gets basket associated
test_steps:
Log in with valid credentials to establish an authenticated session
Trigger the basket association logic (e.g., access a basket-related endpoint)
Verify that a basket is associated with the user (either retrieved existing or newly created)
expected_result: A basket exists and is linked to the authenticated user

title: EP - Unauthenticated user does not trigger basket association
test_steps:
Attempt to access the basket association endpoint without a valid session token
Observe the response and side effects
expected_result: No basket is associated; the request is either rejected or silently ignored

title: DT - Authenticated user finds or creates basket
test_steps:
Authenticate as a valid user
Invoke the basket association mechanism
Check that a basket is present and linked to the user
expected_result: The user has an existing basket or a new one is created, successfully associated

title: DT - Unauthenticated user no basket operation
test_steps:
Without establishing authentication, invoke the basket association logic
Confirm that no basket is found or created
expected_result: No basket operation occurs; no association is made

title: State transition path 1 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
expected_result: A new basket is created and returned for the authenticated user.
